message:
refactor(storage): use byte-level ASCII lowercasing in archive tree sort and fix formatting

- get_archive_tree: replace `.to_lowercase().cmp()` with byte-iterator
  `.to_ascii_lowercase()` comparison, matching the same optimization
  applied in the db crate's sort_entries
- read_message_file: reformat the 50MB safety-limit error message for
  line-length compliance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
